title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at SpiceJet - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at SpiceJet - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SpiceJet is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SpiceJet:
SpiceJet is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
